title: T-060 — Seed scheduler.* permissions onto roles (NNN-scheduler-permission-seed.sql)
prompt:
# T-060 — Seed scheduler.* permissions onto roles

## Goal
Idempotent grant migration (pattern 148-settings-infra-permission-seed.sql) granting the 11 scheduler.* strings to Planner Advanced / Scheduling Officer / Admin for the default/Apex org. Closes X-1 + 07-F2.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — Idempotent; seeded Planner Advanced resolves scheduler.run = allowed; viewer = denied.
- AC2 — DoD live click-through to /scheduler does not 403 for a seeded planner.

## Red lines
- Migration number ≥ HEAD contiguous; org_id Wave0 lock; app.current_org_id() scoping; no hardcoded role UUIDs; no write perms to viewers.

pipeline_inputs.description: Idempotent seed migration granting the 11 scheduler.* strings to Planner Advanced/Scheduling Officer/Admin + org-admin full set. Source: sidecar m07-rbac-grant-seed stub (T-060 of two).
